ddls:
CREATE TABLE "auctions" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction event */,
  "auction_date" TEXT /* Date of the auction */,
  "auction_house_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction house conducting the auction */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the auction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the auction */,
  "total_artworks" INTEGER /* Total number of artworks in the auction */,
  "total_bidders" INTEGER /* Total number of bidders participating in the auction */,
  "minimum_bid" REAL /* Minimum bid amount for the auction */,
  "auction_type" TEXT /* Type of auction (online/offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auctions_auction_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_house_id") REFERENCES auction_houses ("auction_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_houses" (
  "auction_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction house */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the auction house */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the auction house */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the auction house */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the auction house */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the auction house was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the artwork */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artwork including its medium and dimensions */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artwork's image */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium used in the artwork */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artwork */,
  "estimated_price" REAL /* Estimated price of the artwork */,
  "reserve_price" REAL /* Reserve price of the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction where the bid was placed */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork being bid on */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bidder who placed the bid */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bid placed */,
  "bid_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the bid was placed */,
  "auto_bid" INTEGER /* Whether the bid was placed automatically */,
  "max_bid" REAL /* Maximum bid amount set by the bidder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction where the transaction occurred */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork sold */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who purchased the artwork */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who consigned the artwork */,
  "hammer_price" REAL /* Final hammer price of the artwork */,
  "return_to_seller" REAL /* Amount returned to the seller after the sale */,
  "buyer_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid by the buyer */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Transaction fee for the sale */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bidder_registration" (
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidder registration */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer registering as a bidder */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration for the auction */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction the buyer is registering for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bidder_registration_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction result record */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction where the results are recorded */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork auctioned */,
  "total_bids" INTEGER /* Total number of bids placed on the artwork */,
  "highest_bid" REAL /* Highest bid amount placed on the artwork */,
  "average_bid" REAL /* Average bid amount placed on the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_artworks" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auction */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork */,
  "lot_number" INTEGER /* Lot number of the artwork in the auction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id", "artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork image */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artwork image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artwork image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artwork_images_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)
